item.title: Modern Home Build Remodel
item.description: A look at a modern home build and remodel, with a focus on the building process, tools, and project progress. What details stand out most?

item.title: Crafting Strong Foundations for Modern Living
item.description: A look at the process of building strong foundations for modern living, with a focus on practical construction work, tools, and craftsmanship. What details matter most in a solid foundation?

media:content.media:title: Crafting Strong Foundations for Modern Living
media:content.media:description: A look at the process of building strong foundations for modern living, with a focus on practical construction work, tools, and craftsmanship. What details matter most in a solid foundation?

item.title: How We Build Stairs to Meet Code
item.description: A look at the stair-building process and the details that help keep the work code-compliant. Focused on practical construction, careful measurements, and solid craftsmanship. What details matter most?

media:content.media:description: A look at the stair-building process and the details that help keep the work code-compliant. Focused on practical construction, careful measurements, and solid craftsmanship. What details matter most?

item.title: Building a Home Office

item.title: Fixing an Uneven Doorframe on a Build
item.description: A doorframe that’s out of alignment gets adjusted and corrected to ensure a proper fit, smooth operation, and a clean finish. What caused it to end up uneven in the first place?

media:content.media:description: A doorframe that’s out of alignment gets adjusted and corrected to ensure a proper fit, smooth operation, and a clean finish. What caused it to end up uneven in the first place?

item.title: 5 Genius Ways To Find Wall Studs

item.title: Try Sashco Sealants for Free
item.description: Pros can try Sashco’s full sealant line for free through the link provided. A practical offer for builders and contractors working with sealants on the job site. Have you checked it out?

item.title: How To Set Grade Pegs For Level Footing
item.description: A practical guide to setting grade pegs correctly to ensure accurate and level footing during construction. Why is proper grading so important for foundations?

media:content.media:description: A practical guide to setting grade pegs correctly to ensure accurate and level footing during construction. Why is proper grading so important for foundations?
